meta.title: Music Videos
meta.description: Browse every generated music video version for your songs.

hero.title: Generated MV Versions
hero.description: Browse every rendered music video, preview completed exports, and jump back to the source song when you want to create another version.

noVideos.title: No music videos yet
noVideos.description: Open a finalized song, bind photos to the lyrics, and generate a vertical MV. Every render will appear here as its own version.

noMatches.title: No matching videos
noMatches.description: Try a different title keyword or clear the search field to see every generated version.
